# Kimura Massage Therapy & Rehab

> Registered massage therapy clinic in Brampton, Ontario. RMT massage with official insurance receipts from $70, or relaxation massage from $40. Open 7 days a week, 9AM–9PM. Same-day appointments available. Serving Brampton, Mississauga, and Caledon.

## Business Information

- **Clinic name:** Kimura Massage Therapy & Rehab
- **RMT on staff:** Ricky Arora, Registered Massage Therapist (RMT), licensed with the College of Massage Therapists of Ontario
- **Address:** 14 Block Road, Brampton, Ontario, L7A 5B2
- **Phone:** (905) 226-6336
- **WhatsApp:** 64728737777
- **Hours:** Monday–Sunday, 9:00 AM – 9:00 PM
- **Same-day appointments:** Available most days
- **Service area:** Brampton, Mississauga, Caledon, Greater Toronto Area (GTA)
- **Website:** https://kimuramassage.ca
- **Google rating:** 5.0 stars · 200+ verified reviews

## Services

- [Swedish Relaxation Massage – Brampton](https://kimuramassage.ca/swedish-massage-brampton.html): Full-body relaxation massage targeting stress, muscle tension, and nervous system recovery. Available as RMT (with insurance receipt) or relaxation massage.
- [Deep Tissue Massage – Brampton](https://kimuramassage.ca/deep-tissue-massage-brampton.html): Targets chronic muscle tension, knots, and postural strain. Recommended for desk workers, chronic neck/shoulder/lower back pain. Available as RMT (with insurance receipt) or relaxation massage.
- [Sports Massage Therapy – Brampton](https://kimuramassage.ca/sports-massage-brampton.html): Pre-event preparation and post-event recovery massage for athletes. Addresses overuse injuries, range of motion, and performance maintenance. Available as RMT (with insurance receipt) or relaxation massage.

## Pricing

### RMT Massage (Registered Massage Therapist — insurance receipts provided)
- 30 minutes: $70
- 60 minutes: $115 (most popular)
- 75 minutes: $150
- 90 minutes: $175

### Relaxation Massage (no insurance receipt)
- 30 minutes: $40
- 60 minutes: $70
- 90 minutes: $100

Direct billing is available for 30+ major insurers, including Blue Cross, Canada Life, ClaimSecure, Desjardins, Green Shield, Green Life, Manulife, Sun Life, TELUS AdjudiCare, and more. Direct billing depends on plan rules, remaining coverage, and insurer approval at the time of submission. RMT sessions include an official insurance receipt.

## Featured Blog Guides

- [Does Insurance Cover RMT Massage Therapy in Ontario?](https://kimuramassage.ca/blog/does-insurance-cover-rmt-massage-ontario.html): How extended health benefits cover RMT massage, which insurers accept it, and how to submit a claim
- [Deep Tissue vs. Swedish Massage: Which Should You Choose?](https://kimuramassage.ca/blog/deep-tissue-vs-swedish-massage.html): Breakdown of differences and how to choose the right treatment
- [What to Expect at Your First RMT Massage in Brampton](https://kimuramassage.ca/blog/what-to-expect-rmt-massage-brampton.html): Intake, draping, pressure, and post-session expectations
- [How Often Should You Get a Massage?](https://kimuramassage.ca/blog/how-often-should-you-get-a-massage.html): Frequency guide for stress, chronic pain, and sports recovery
- [Tech Neck: Why Your Phone Is Wrecking Your Neck](https://kimuramassage.ca/blog/tech-neck.html): Cervical spine loading from screen use, causes, and treatment
- [Massage for Desk Workers](https://kimuramassage.ca/blog/massage-for-desk-workers.html): Addressing neck, shoulder, and lower back pain from prolonged sitting

## Policies

- **Cancellation policy:** 24 hours' notice required to cancel or reschedule. Late cancellations and no-shows may be charged the full session fee.
- **Tipping:** Never expected or required.
- **Consent:** Clients are always in full control of pressure, focus areas, and can stop the session at any time.
- **Hygiene:** All linens freshly laundered before every client. Table and surfaces fully disinfected between appointments. Hands washed before every session.
- **Payment:** Cash, debit, credit accepted. Direct billing may be available for supported insurers. RMT sessions include official insurance receipt.

## Muscle Tightness & Recovery Guides

Kimura Massage publishes guides on common muscle tightness conditions including: tight shoulders, tight neck, tight back, tight hips, tight hamstrings, tight calves, muscle knots, trigger points, tech neck, text neck, rounded shoulders, postural tension, morning stiffness, gym soreness, sports muscle tightness, and more. Full library at https://kimuramassage.ca/blog/

## Pain & Injury Condition Guides

Guides covering: mechanical low back pain, sciatica, cervical disc herniation, rotator cuff tendinopathy, IT band syndrome, plantar fasciitis, carpal tunnel syndrome, piriformis syndrome, frozen shoulder, tennis elbow, golfer's elbow, fibromyalgia, myofascial pain syndrome, and 150+ other musculoskeletal conditions. Full library at https://kimuramassage.ca/blog/

## Posture & Alignment Guides

Guides covering: kyphosis, lordosis, scoliosis, forward head posture, rounded shoulders, upper crossed syndrome, lower crossed syndrome, anterior pelvic tilt, scapular winging, and more. Full library at https://kimuramassage.ca/blog/
